languages.text: "Чрезвычайно амбивалентное решение, Вольный Торговец. Единственное, чем оно может оказаться полезно — облегчение доступа к кадаврам и технологиям ксеносов. И поверьте, кадавры не заставят себя ждать с обеих сторон, какие бы обещания вам не дали ксеносы".

"A highly ambivalent decision, Rogue Trader. The sole benefit it may yield is facilitating access to xenos cadavers and technology. And rest assured, cadavers will by no means be in short supply on either side, no matter what promises the xenos have made."
languages.original_text: "Чрезвычайно амбивалентное решение, Вольный Торговец. Единственное, чем оно может оказаться полезно — облегчение доступа к кадаврам и технологиям ксеносов. И поверьте, кадавры не заставят себя ждать с обеих сторон, какие бы обещания вам не дали ксеносы".

traits.locale_text: "A highly ambivalent decision, Rogue Trader. The sole benefit it may yield is facilitating access to xenos cadavers and technology. And rest assured, cadavers will by no means be in short supply on either side, no matter what promises the xenos made."

"A highly ambivalent decision, Rogue Trader. The sole benefit it may yield is facilitating access to xenos cadavers and technology. And rest assured, cadavers will by no means be in short supply on either side, no matter what promises the xenos made."

"A highly ambivalent decision, Rogue Trader. The sole benefit it may yield is facilitating access to xenos cadavers and technology. And rest assured, cadavers will by no means be in short supply on either side, no matter what promises the xenos have made."

"A highly ambivalent decision, Rogue Trader. The sole benefit it may yield is facilitating access to xenos cadavers and technology. And rest assured, cadavers will by no means be in short supply on either side, no matter what promises the xenos have made."

languages.text: «Una decisión muy ambivalente, Comerciante. El único beneficio que puede otorgar es facilitar el acceso a cadáveres y tecnología xenos. Y puede estar segur{mf|o|a} de que no faltarán cadáveres en ninguno de los bandos, sin importar las promesas de los xenos».
languages.original_text: "A highly ambivalent decision, Rogue Trader. The sole benefit it may yield is facilitating access to xenos cadavers and technology. And rest assured, cadavers will by no means be in short supply on either side, no matter what promises the xenos have made."

traits.locale_text: «Una decisión muy ambivalente, Comerciante. El único beneficio que puede otorgar es facilitar el acceso a cadáveres y tecnología xenos. Y puede estar segur{mf|o|a} de que no faltarán cadáveres en ninguno de los bandos, sin importar las promesas de los xenos».

languages.text: “这个决定利弊难料，行商浪人。它唯一明确的好处，大概就是能让我们更容易获得异形尸体和异形技术。而您可以放心，不管那些异形许下了什么承诺，双方都绝不会缺尸体。”
languages.original_text: "A highly ambivalent decision, Rogue Trader. The sole benefit it may yield is facilitating access to xenos cadavers and technology. And rest assured, cadavers will by no means be in short supply on either side, no matter what promises the xenos have made."

traits.locale_text: “这个决定利弊难料，行商浪人。它唯一明确的好处，大概就是能让我们更容易获得异形尸体和异形技术。而您可以放心，不管那些异形许下了什么承诺，双方都绝不会缺尸体。”

languages.text: "Eine ausgesprochen ambivalente Entscheidung, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ihr einziger Vorteil wäre Zugang zu Kadavern und Technologien der Xenos. Und ich versichere Euch, Kadaver werden wir auf beiden Seiten genug haben, egal, was die Xenos versprochen haben."
languages.original_text: "A highly ambivalent decision, Rogue Trader. The sole benefit it may yield is facilitating access to xenos cadavers and technology. And rest assured, cadavers will by no means be in short supply on either side, no matter what promises the xenos have made."

traits.locale_text: "Eine ausgesprochen ambivalente Entscheidung, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ihr einziger Vorteil wäre Zugang zu Kadavern und Technologien der Xenos. Und ich versichere Euch, Kadaver werden wir auf beiden Seiten genug haben, egal, was die Xenos versprochen haben."

languages.text: « Une décision hautement ambivalente dont le seul avantage serait de faciliter l'accès à des cadavres xénos, ainsi qu'à leur technologie. Et vous pouvez être {mf|sûr|sûre} que lesdits cadavres ne manqueront pas, ni d'un côté ni de l'autre, quoi que les ennemis de l'humanité vous aient promis. »
languages.original_text: "A highly ambivalent decision, Rogue Trader. The sole benefit it may yield is facilitating access to xenos cadavers and technology. And rest assured, cadavers will by no means be in short supply on either side, no matter what promises the xenos have made."

traits.locale_text: « Une décision hautement ambivalente dont le seul avantage serait de faciliter l'accès à des cadavres xénos, ainsi qu'à leur technologie. Et vous pouvez être {mf|sûr|sûre} que lesdits cadavres ne manqueront pas, ni d'un côté ni de l'autre, quoi que les ennemis de l'humanité vous aient promis. »

languages.text: "Oldukça çelişkili bir karar Hür Tacir. Sağlayabileceği tek fayda, zeno kadavralarına ve teknolojisine erişimi kolaylaştırmak olacaktır. Emin olun zenolar ne söz vermiş olursa olsun, her iki tarafta da kadavra sıkıntısı kesinlikle yaşanmayacaktır."
languages.original_text: "A highly ambivalent decision, Rogue Trader. The sole benefit it may yield is facilitating access to xenos cadavers and technology. And rest assured, cadavers will by no means be in short supply on either side, no matter what promises the xenos have made."

traits.locale_text: "Oldukça çelişkili bir karar Hür Tacir. Sağlayabileceği tek fayda, zeno kadavralarına ve teknolojisine erişimi kolaylaştırmak olacaktır. Emin olun zenolar ne söz vermiş olursa olsun, her iki tarafta da kadavra sıkıntısı kesinlikle yaşanmayacaktır."

languages.text: 「非常に両義的な決断ですね、ローグトレーダー。唯一の恩恵は、異種生物の遺体や技術へのアクセスを容易にすることでしょう。そしてご安心ください、遺体は両側とも決して不足することはありません。異種生物がどんな約束をしてもです。」
languages.original_text: "A highly ambivalent decision, Rogue Trader. The sole benefit it may yield is facilitating access to xenos cadavers and technology. And rest assured, cadavers will by no means be in short supply on either side, no matter what promises the xenos have made."

traits.locale_text: 「非常に両義的な決断ですね、ローグトレーダー。唯一の恩恵は、異種生物の遺体や技術へのアクセスを容易にすることでしょう。そしてご安心ください、遺体は両側とも決して不足することはありません。異種生物がどんな約束をしてもです。」
